extortion.description: Scott Engineering is a manufacturer of medium voltage padmounted equipment for the American utility industry. The organization was founded in 1966 on the premise that a need exists for custom fabrication of top quality equipment to precisely fulfill the operating needs of each specific customer. Our rapid expansion from a small shop to a modern facility is evidence not only of the need but of Scott Engineering's ability to fulfill the requirements. Scott Engineering's commitment to quality starts with a robust design process and quality production practices that are prevalent throughout our organization. To further this commitment, Scott Engineering is an employee owned corporation and our entire team takes great pride in their workmanship and oversees quality practices.
